tools.name: tasklists.tasksTasklistsDelete
tools.description: Deletes the authenticated user's specified task list.

tools.name: tasklists.tasksTasklistsGet
tools.description: Returns the authenticated user's specified task list.

tools.name: tasklists.tasksTasklistsInsert
tools.description: Creates a new task list and adds it to the authenticated user's task lists.

tools.name: tasklists.tasksTasklistsList
tools.description: Returns all the authenticated user's task lists.

tools.name: tasklists.tasksTasklistsPatch
tools.description: Updates the authenticated user's specified task list. This method supports patch semantics.

tools.name: tasklists.tasksTasklistsUpdate
tools.description: Updates the authenticated user's specified task list.

tools.name: tasks.tasksClear
tools.description: Clears all completed tasks from the specified task list. The affected tasks will be marked as 'hidden' and no longer be returned by default when retrieving all tasks for a task list.

tools.name: tasks.tasksDelete
tools.description: Deletes the specified task from the task list.

tools.name: tasks.tasksInsert
tools.description: Creates a new task on the specified task list.

tools.name: tasks.tasksList
tools.description: Returns all tasks in the specified task list.

tools.name: tasks.tasksMove
tools.description: Moves the specified task to another position in the task list. This can include putting it as a child task under a new parent and/or move it to a different position among its sibling tasks.

tools.name: tasks.tasksPatch
tools.description: Updates the specified task. This method supports patch semantics.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
